meaning: adj.四倍的,四重的,[乐]每小节四拍的n.四倍vt.使成四倍vi.成为四倍
examples: This year we produced quadruple the amount produced in 2002.
China seeks to quadruple its income in twenty years.
Fifty-nine percent of its residents have attended graduate school – quadruple the national average.
The European Union estimates the number of GM traits in crops will quadruple to 120 by 2015.
In five of the cases, this was by a triple- or quadruple-digit percentage point margin!
